text:
I wish official translations follow the Korean government "Revised Romanization".

The character's name is 휘주 (Hwiju) not 희주 (Huiju/Heeju). Different pronunciations. Different names. And often also different meanings.

휘주 (Hwiju) means regal jewel.

#Kdrama #PerfectCrown

text:
Wow! It _IS_ raining in Makati City, Philippines even though it feels like 34℃ (actual temp is 23℃). 😆

This is a good break from the constant dry heat that makes you sweat slowly. We can breathe for a few hours until it goes back up to 44℃ (feels like).

#Philippines

text:
In the Filipino language (n.b. All Philippine languages!), a change in pronunciation changes the meaning of a word. Here's an example which is ambigous in written form without proper Filipino diacritics.

「Labi ng labi ang labi sa labi.」

#Languages #Filipino #Philippines

text:
Myth: Filipinos are Spanish & Pacific Islanders.

The #DNA truth in the #Philippines:
- 🧬 90-95% Austronesian
- 🇨🇳 3-5% East Asian (mostly Chinese)
- 🇪🇸 0-2% Spanish (mostly 0)
- 🏝️ 0% Pacific Islander (Melanesian)

We are #Filipino. We are brown. We are Asians. 🇵🇭

text:
How to write "drama" in Surat Inawa (The Living Script): 듸라마 (dra·ma). In Hangeul or Hangul, it's written as 드라마 (deu·ra·ma).

Learn more about #SuratInawa here: https://t.co/UmCSS13rRs

#Philippines #Languages #Filipino

raw.full_text:
How to write "drama" in Surat Inawa (The Living Script): 듸라마 (dra·ma). In Hangeul or Hangul, it's written as 드라마 (deu·ra·ma).

Learn more about #SuratInawa here: https://t.co/UmCSS13rRs

#Philippines #Languages #Filipino

text:
The beauty of the Surat Inawa alphabet writing system is that it's strictly phonetic. Consider the following:

- 필리핀싀 (Philippines; aspirated P)
- 필리핀싀 (Pilipins; unaspirated P)
- 필리피낫 (Pilipinas; unaspirated P)

#SuratInawa #Philippines #Filipino #Languages #필리핀싀

raw.full_text:

- 필리핀싀 (Philippines; aspirated P)
- 필리핀싀 (Pilipins; unaspirated P)
- 필리피낫 (Pilipinas; unaspirated P)

#SuratInawa #Philippines #Filipino #Languages #필리핀싀

text:
To the future humans, aliens, or machines,

I want to live forever. So submit your proposals.

- Future DNA manipulation? Three-strand DNA?
- Alien DNA?
- Turn into a Borg? Well, I'll reject Borgness immediately, give me something else. 😆
- Picardness? Is that still me though?
